/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/docs/termux.md:8:2. Install [Termux:API](https://github.com/termux/termux-api#installation) from GitHub or F-Droid for clipboard and other device integrations
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/docs/termux.md:31:Clipboard operations use `termux-clipboard-set` and `termux-clipboard-get` when running in Termux. The Termux:API app must be installed for these to work.
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/docs/termux.md:33:Image clipboard is not supported on Termux (the `ctrl+v` image paste feature will not work).
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/docs/termux.md:61:termux-clipboard-set "text"   # Copy
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/docs/termux.md:62:termux-clipboard-get          # Paste
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/docs/termux.md:98:- **No image clipboard**: Termux clipboard API only supports text
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/docs/termux.md:99:- **No native binaries**: Some optional native dependencies (like the clipboard module) are unavailable on Android ARM64 and are skipped during installation

/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:23:- Fixed Bun release archive creation to install and copy the matching `@mariozechner/clipboard` base package and native sidecars ([#5184](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi-mono/issues/5184)).
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:55:- Fixed Windows startup crashes under MSYS2 ucrt64 Node.js by updating the native clipboard addon to napi-rs 3.x ([#5028](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi/issues/5028)).
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:139:- Fixed macOS Bun release binaries to resolve the native clipboard sidecar so Ctrl+V image paste can load `@mariozechner/clipboard` ([#4307](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi/issues/4307)).
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:250:- Fixed macOS clipboard access errors under sandboxed pasteboard denial so they do not abort the process ([#4492](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi/issues/4492)).
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:300:- Fixed `/copy` reporting success on Linux without writing the clipboard on Wayland-only compositors (Hyprland, Niri, ...) by skipping the X11-only native addon on Linux and routing through `wl-copy`/`xclip`/`xsel` instead ([#4177](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/4177)).
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:403:- Fixed WSL clipboard image paste by passing the PowerShell save path directly instead of through a custom environment variable ([#2469](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/2469)).
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:414:- Updated `@mariozechner/clipboard` to an attested release so package managers with trust policies do not reject installs ([#3946](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/3946)).
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:524:- Fixed `/copy` to avoid unbounded OSC 52 writes and clipboard races that could break terminal rendering or panic the native clipboard addon ([#3639](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/3639))
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:1250:- Fixed desktop clipboard text copy to prefer native OS clipboard integration before shell fallbacks, improving reliability on macOS and Windows ([#2347](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/2347))
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:1342:- Fixed WSL clipboard image fallback to properly handle missing clipboard utilities and permission errors ([#1722](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/1722))
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:1348:- Fixed headless clipboard fallback logging spurious errors in non-interactive environments ([#2056](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/2056))
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:2014:- **Linux ARM64 musl support**: Pi now runs on Alpine Linux ARM64 (linux-arm64-musl) via updated clipboard dependency.
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:2022:- Added Linux ARM64 musl (Alpine Linux) support via clipboard dependency update
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:2023:- Added Android/Termux support with graceful clipboard fallback ([#1164](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/1164))
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/CHANGELOG.md:2068:- Fixed clipboard image paste on WSL2/WSLg writing invalid PNG files when clipboard provides `image/bmp` format. No more clipboard frustration when using pi over SSH. ([#1069](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono/issues/1069) by [@gturkoglu](https://github.com/gturkoglu))

/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@mariozechner/clipboard/README.md:11:**NPM Package**: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@mariozechner/clipboard
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@mariozechner/clipboard/README.md:13:**GitHub**: https://github.com/badlogic/clipboard
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@mariozechner/clipboard/README.md:15:> This is a clipboard API npm package that allows you to copy and paste data to and from the clipboard.
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@mariozechner/clipboard/README.md:16:> There doesn't seem to be a good clipboard package for node.js (that supports data format beyond text), so I decided to make one.
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@mariozechner/clipboard/README.md:27:- [ChurchTao/clipboard-rs](https://github.com/ChurchTao/clipboard-rs) is written in rust, which is used to provide the native clipboard support for this package across Linux, Windows and MacOS. This package is basically a wrapper around this rust package.
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@mariozechner/clipboard/README.md:28:  - https://crates.io/crates/clipboard-rs
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@mariozechner/clipboard/README.md:40:import Clipboard from "@mariozechner/clipboard";
/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@mariozechner/clipboard/README.md:60:The GitHub Actions `NPM_TOKEN` repository secret is a granular npm token with publish access to `@mariozechner/clipboard` and all `@mariozechner/clipboard-*` platform packages. npm granular access tokens expire after 90 days, so this secret must be rotated before expiry.
